session_summary: PRD for KBUtilLib notebook engine redesign. Replaces 840-line notebook_utils.py + per-project god-class util.py with formal provenanced data engine: SQLite catalog + parquet vectors + content-addressed blobs, typed Experiment/Sample/Vector schema, manifest notebook with freshness tracking, function migration lifecycle, and tiered test framework. ADP1Notebooks is the proving ground.

tasks.description: Phase 1 — Data engine core (SQLite catalog, parquet vectors, blob store, NotebookSession API, serializer registry, backward-compat shim)
Phase 2 — Schema implementation (Pydantic models, vector_types.yaml registry, validate_entities)
tasks.notes: 1 week est. Can overlap with Phase 1.

tasks.description: Phase 3 — Manifest v1 (notebook generator, browse API, mtime-based stale detection)
Phase 4.5 — Rewrite /jupyter-dev skill to teach new pattern
Phase 5 — Manifest v2 (cell-source-hash) + function migration CLI

created.purpose: Original user vision and follow-up direction
Full PRD with locked design, schema, API, DDL, phasing, and tests

comments: All 13 design decisions from the session are locked and recorded in §15 of fullprompt.md.
Phase 1 is ready to hand to an AgentForge developer task once the user approves; recommend --auto-merge --auto-review with --timeout 900.
Existing notebook_utils.py is preserved as a backward-compat shim during migration; not deleted in v1.
The 5-base multi-inheritance pattern in ADP1Notebooks is NOT being refactored — new engine is a peer, not a replacement. Composition refactor deferred.
Hard rule: no pickle. Each object type (MSGenome, COBRA model, MSExpression, etc.) gets a dedicated serializer module.
context: Design session conducted 2026-05-02 → 2026-05-03 via /ai-design. Project state for kbutillib in AIAssistant has goals, decisions, and notes recorded in parallel. Active questions resolved: storage hybrid (SQLite+Parquet), per-vector parquet, name-as-primary identity, hybrid NotebookSession, no-pickle, open VectorType registry, label-based replicates, lineage-based aggregation, lazy EntityRef resolution, 6-kind Mutation taxonomy, 3-arm Experiment union (Sample/Computation/ExternalDataset), silent overwrite, in-tree catalog at notebooks/.kbcache/.
